message:
feat(cm): add CM client methods and tests for skill mining integration

- Add get_rules() method to fetch playbook rules by category
- Add similar() method to find similar rules in playbook
- Add rule_exists() method to check for existing rules
- Add add_rule() method to add new rules to playbook
- Add validate_rule() method to validate rules against history
- Add comprehensive unit tests for all new types and methods
- Extend mod.rs to export new types

Part of meta_skill-mc3 (CM Integration)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
